description: Structures and tracks an OSHA PSM 14-element process-safety program (29 CFR 1910.119): per-element status (compliant / gap / overdue), evidence, gap-risk band, and owners — the program backbone. Produces a 14-element status matrix with a hierarchy-of-controls remediation plan and SMART actions tracked to closure. Decision-support only; a competent person must review the output.
name: psm-program-manager
